title: genista lunaris
intro: Genista lunaris, also known as the "Moon Carrot" or "Lunar Spurge", is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, derived from its alkaloids and saponins. Genista lunaris has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
